name: Sausage Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes and Green Chilies, Diced (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a skillet over medium heat until fully cooked.
2. Drain any excess fat from the sausage.
3. Melt the cheese using a double boiler or microwave, stirring occasionally.
4. Combine the diced tomatoes with green chilies and melted cheese in a bowl.
5. Mix in the cooked sausage until well combined.
